[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110010000 3
1 0000000100 1
2 0010111100 5
3 1010100110 5
4 0110010000 3
5 1110101100 6
6 1110011101 7
